title: Tri Wealth Bracelet – Set of 3 Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone Crystal Bracelets with Hamsa Charm
short_description: A coordinated set of three crystal bracelets in Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone, finished with a silver-toned Hamsa charm — for a wealth-inspired, grounded and protected everyday look.
body_html:
Turn your everyday intentions into a powerful style statement with the Tri Wealth Bracelet. This thoughtfully designed set of three bracelets combines metallic Pyrite, glossy Black Obsidian and textured Lava Stone in three distinctive arrangements.

Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, confidence and success-focused energy, while Black Obsidian represents grounding and protection from negativity. Lava Stone adds stability and strength, creating a balanced combination for those who want to move towards abundance while staying focused and protected.

One bracelet is completed with a detailed silver-toned Hamsa charm, traditionally regarded as a symbol of protection against nazar and unwanted energy. Wear all three together for a bold layered look, or style them separately according to your outfit and intention.

Why you'll love it

  • Three bracelets in one set — coordinated crystal designs with individual patterns and styling possibilities.
  • Wealth-inspired crystal combination — Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone represent prosperity, protection and grounded progress.
  • Meaningful Hamsa charm — a detailed silver-toned symbol traditionally connected with positivity and protection from nazar.
  • Distinctive individual designs — each bracelet has its own arrangement while complementing the complete trio.
  • Flexible slip-on construction — the stretch-style design makes every bracelet easy to wear and remove.
  • Bold everyday styling — the black, metallic gold and silver-toned combination creates a premium, versatile look for men and women.

Crystal properties and symbolic meanings are based on traditional beliefs and are not financial, medical or guaranteed outcome claims.
seo_title: Tri Wealth Bracelet Set of 3 – Pyrite & Hamsa Crystals
seo_description: Set of 3 crystal bracelets – Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone with a silver Hamsa charm. Wealth, protection & grounding. Stretch slip-on fit.

metafields.highlights: Set of three coordinated crystal bracelets · Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone beads · Silver-toned Hamsa charm · Metallic spacer accents · Flexible stretch-style construction · Wear together or separately · Suitable for men and women
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Pyrite beads, Black Obsidian beads, Lava Stone beads, silver-toned Hamsa charm, silver-toned metallic spacers, flexible stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip each bracelet on gently over the hand without over-stretching the cord. Keep away from water, perfume and sweat to protect the finish. Wipe with a soft dry cloth and store flat in a pouch when not in use.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.a: You receive a set of three coordinated crystal bracelets, each with its own arrangement — Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone beads, with a silver-toned Hamsa charm on one.
Each bracelet is a flexible stretch-style slip-on with no clasp, so it comfortably fits most wrist sizes for both men and women.
Yes — the set uses genuine Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone beads, finished with silver-toned metallic spacers and a Hamsa charm.

faqs.q: What does the crystal combination mean?
faqs.a: Pyrite is traditionally linked with wealth and confidence, Black Obsidian with grounding and protection, and Lava Stone with strength and stability. The Hamsa symbolises protection from nazar. These are traditional beliefs, not guaranteed outcomes.

faqs.q: Can I wear all three together?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Stack all three for a bold layered look, or wear them separately to match your outfit and intention.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for daily wear?
faqs.a: Yes. The stretch construction and durable beadwork make it easy to slip on and off, ideal for everyday styling and meaningful gifting.

page_blocks.subtitle: Wealth-Inspired Crystals | Protective Hamsa Charm | Set of 3 Stretch Bracelets
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Wealth Bracelet is a coordinated set of three crystal bracelets combining metallic Pyrite, glossy Black Obsidian and textured Lava Stone. One bracelet carries a detailed silver-toned Hamsa charm, tying together a wealth-inspired look that stays grounded and protected. Wear all three stacked or style each on its own.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Pyrite Beads – metallic golden-grey beads that add richness and shine, traditionally linked with prosperity and confidence
✦ Black Obsidian Beads – polished black beads that add depth and contrast, traditionally connected with grounding and protection
✦ Lava Stone Beads – naturally textured black beads that lend an earthy, powerful look, traditionally linked with stability and strength
✦ Hamsa Charm – a detailed silver-toned charm on one bracelet, traditionally regarded as protection from nazar
✦ Metallic Spacer Accents – silver-toned spacers that separate the beads for a clean, premium finish
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – a stretchable slip-on construction that wears comfortably without a clasp
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Wealth-Inspired Combination
Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone come together to represent prosperity, protection and grounded progress.
✨ Protection You Can Wear
The silver-toned Hamsa charm is traditionally believed to guard against nazar and unwanted energy.
✨ Three Looks in One Set
Three distinct arrangements let you stack a bold layered stack or style each bracelet on its own.
✨ Effortless Slip-On Fit
The flexible stretch construction slides on easily and suits both men and women.
✨ Premium Everyday Styling
The black, metallic gold and silver-toned palette gives a versatile, premium finish for daily wear.
✨ Thoughtful Gifting
A meaningful, intention-led set that makes a considered gift for someone you care about.
page_blocks.product_details:
Base Metal: Alloy beads with metal spacers
Stones: Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone
Charm: Silver-toned Hamsa
Color: Black, Metallic Gold & Silver-toned
Finish: Polished beads with textured Lava Stone
Construction: Flexible stretch-style slip-on
detail_points: 💰 Set of 3 wealth-inspired crystal bracelets in one bundle
🖐 Silver-toned Hamsa charm for protection from nazar
🧿 Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone crystal combination
✨ Flexible stretch slip-on fit for men and women
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Wealth Bracelet (Set of 3)
Design: Beaded stretch bracelets with silver-toned Hamsa charm
Material: Pyrite, Black Obsidian & Lava Stone beads with metallic spacers
Net Quantity: 3 Bracelets
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Gently slip each bracelet over your hand — the stretch cord fits without a clasp.
2. Stack all three together for a bold layered look, or wear them separately by intention.
3. Keep away from water, perfume and sweat, and wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear.
4. Store flat in a pouch to protect the beads and finish.
